case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. TONY LAMARR BLU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,748.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT BLU, TONY LAMARR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2013 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, MATTER WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLU, TONY LAMARR $2,748.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,788.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.50 SERVED JUL-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLU, TONY LAMARR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-05-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF HE HAS MADE HIS PAYMENTS AS AGREED. IF DEFENDANT HAS NOT MADE PAYMENTS AS AGREED, DEFENDANT MUST APPEAR AT P/R DATE AND IF HE DOES NOT APPEAR JUDGMENT UNTIL ISSUE FOR THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSALBA FARRELL--SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. CASE SETTLED THROUGH MEDIATION. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
